33) What is the timeline for transfer of IDCW and redemption proceeds to 
investors/unitholders: 
 
The payment of IDCW (dividend) proceeds to the investors/unitholders shall be made within seven 
working days from the record date*. The transfer of redemption or repurchase proceeds to the
